queries.question: List name from instructor records full-joined with course, teaches.
queries.sql: SELECT "instructor"."name" FROM "instructor" FULL OUTER JOIN "course" ON "instructor"."dept_name" = "course"."dept_name" FULL OUTER JOIN "teaches" ON "instructor"."name" = "teaches"."instructor_name";

queries.question: List name and dept name from instructor records full-joined with course, teaches.
